nasb.text: On every lofty mountain and on every high hill there will be streams running with water on the day of the great slaughter, when the towers fall.

esv.text: And on every lofty mountain and every high hill there will be brooks running with water, in the day of the great slaughter, when the towers fall.

cnv.text: 在大行殺戮的日子，高臺倒塌的時候，各高山岡陵都必有溪水湧流。

ccb.text: 在你们的敌人被杀戮、城楼倒塌的日子，你们的高山冈陵上必有溪水奔流。

csbs.text: 在大行杀戮的日子，在城楼倒塌的时候，一切崇山峻岭都将有溪水涌流。
